mission_context: Improve planning support for regional field operations without expanding operator workload.
constraints: Pilot scope must fit within one service region.
Operational reporting cannot depend on manual spreadsheet merges.

stakeholders.name: Operations Lead
stakeholders.priority: reduce manual handoffs between triage and dispatch

stakeholders.name: Program Analyst
stakeholders.priority: compare improvement ideas against mission goals

stakeholders.name: Regional Manager
stakeholders.priority: keep rollout simple for one-region adoption

current_capabilities.notes: Shows active work queues by region and shift.
Operators assemble a summary packet from several internal views.
Small pilot learnings are captured, but comparisons are inconsistent.
